narrative:
Tallmadge 1-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,151 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.5 percentage points.
